query:
INSERT INTO match_participants (match_id, chungid, name, frags, deaths, accuracy, elo)
              SELECT
                  $1,
                  t.chungid,
                  t.name,
                  t.frags,
                  t.deaths,
                  t.accuracy,
                  t.elo --Currently used wrong, want to use it as a present-of value
              FROM UNNEST (
                  $2::uuid[],
                  $3::text[],
                  $4::int[],
                  $5::int[],
                  $6::float8[],
                  $7::int[]
              ) AS t(chungid, name, frags, deaths, accuracy, elo)
